questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Trescal and/or TR Calibration.

Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Trescal and TR Calibration are close competitors and whether there are many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
